stonetop.summary: A chief's very best, brought to bear when war-bands meet on the open plain.

system.concept: A chief's very best, brought to bear when war-bands meet on the open plain.
system.description: Most violence in the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.NERZ6p7FNc1pxNWL]{North Manmarch} is small and intimate — a nighttime raid on a steading, an ambush in the hills, throats slit around a campfire. But when chiefs raise large forces and meet on the open plains, they bring their very best. Each chariot is pulled by two tonnerhorns and carries a driver and two warriors.
